name: library-management-system
description: A comprehensive Library Management System (LMS) designed for universities to manage books, members (students and faculty), and borrowing records efficiently. The system includes an intuitive interface for both users and administrators, powered by a robust backend and a relational database.

scripts.build-mobile: xcopy /Y *.html www\ && xcopy /Y *.css www\ && xcopy /Y *.js www\ && xcopy /Y *.png www\ && xcopy /Y manifest.json www\
scripts.sync-mobile: npm run build-mobile && npx cap sync
